summary: TWO_COLUMN Galton-Watson branching process with Poisson(λ) offspring. LEFT: GREEN nodes + TEAL edges form genealogical tree growing via gen_tr. RIGHT axes with BLUE φ(q)=e^(λ(q-1)) intersecting GREY y=q at RED extinction-probability fixed points; ValueTracker lambda_tr morphs λ∈[0.8, 1.5] showing bifurcation.
